title: Delhivery Digital Technologies is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Delhivery Digital Technologies is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Delhivery Digital Technologies has an exciting opening for a Warehouse Manager at our Amritsar office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Delhivery Digital Technologies:
Delhivery Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Delhivery Digital Technologies!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
